surfaces.title: Interactive approvals
surfaces.notes: Codex folds sir's internal ask verdict into block with remediation text.

surfaces.title: File-read IFC labeling
surfaces.notes: Bash-mediated sensitive reads (cat/sed/head/tail/grep/etc.) are promoted to read_ref before execution.

surfaces.title: File-write pre-gating
surfaces.notes: Native apply_patch writes bypass PreToolUse on codex-cli 0.118.x; posture tamper is caught post-hoc.

surfaces.title: Shell classification
surfaces.notes: Every hooked Codex tool call is Bash, so sir's shell classifier is the primary enforcement path.

surfaces.title: MCP tool hooks
surfaces.notes: Codex does not fire hooks for MCP tools today.

surfaces.title: Terminal posture sweep
surfaces.notes: The final posture sweep runs on Stop because Codex exposes no SessionEnd hook.
